profile.name: Ngoun Bunlux
profile.title: Data Science Student & AI Engineer
profile.bio: Passionate student at Royal University of Phnom Penh focusing on Machine Learning and Generative AI application design.

projects.title: Healthcare AI System
projects.description: An advanced disease diagnostics and health-monitoring engine leveraging localized medical datasets.
projects.longDescription: A sophisticated full-stack machine learning solution designed to predict, catalog, and analyze epidemic and systemic health risks across Southeast Asia. Features clean WebGL graphics, predictive dials, and localized reports.
projects.challenges: Analyzing high-sparsity localized health reports with incomplete variables.
projects.solutions: Engineered deep imputation models utilizing temporal and geolocation heuristics to maximize training fidelity.

projects.title: AI Image Editor Pro
projects.description: State-of-the-art web canvas integrating generative neural filters for photo editing and upscaling.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive client-side photo studio implementing advanced canvas rendering loops, custom shaders, neural filters, and seamless API connectors for automated background removal and super-resolution upscaling.
projects.challenges: Avoiding UI freezes during massive array transformations on the client browser.
projects.solutions: Dispatched computationally intense manipulation tasks to local browser Web Workers.

projects.title: Math Quest
projects.description: Interactive, gamified education platform leveraging AI-generated mathematics challenges.
projects.longDescription: A dynamic learning portal that creates math missions customized for student performance. Tracks precision metrics and speeds, adjusting the narrative and question difficulty in real-time.
projects.challenges: Generating valid mathematical expressions dynamically that guarantee solvability.
projects.solutions: Established a robust semantic math parser and expression compiler backed by state validation constraints.

projects.title: Phnom Clean Up Crew
projects.description: Crowdsourced waste tracking and civic engagement platform built for urban Phnom Penh.
projects.longDescription: Features interactive maps, GPS pinning, and clean coordinate reporting paired with gamified rewards to transform rubbish collection and municipal engagement across Phnom Penh.
projects.challenges: Securing location markers against malicious spam or false coordinates.
projects.solutions: Built an image-verification pipeline and strict distance-to-marker validation checks.
futureImprovements: Scale to other major municipal regions

projects.title: E-Invitation Hub
projects.description: An elegant, media-rich scheduling suite with customized invitation canvases and RSVPs.
projects.longDescription: A premium event portal designed to create visually gorgeous invitations, complete with rich multimedia overlays, interactive maps, and localized RSVP tracking databases.
projects.challenges: Delivering responsive audio-visual payloads safely across various low-bandwidth mobile carriers.
projects.solutions: Leveraged image lazy loading and selective media container resolution downgrades based on active connections.

projects.title: Keen Movie
projects.description: Premium responsive web template designed for elegant digital cards and invitations.
projects.longDescription: Designed with elegant minimalist layouts, fluid scrolling transitions, and easy metadata configuration for beautiful wedding card hosting.
projects.challenges: Creating fluid parallax effects that compile smoothly across mobile browsers without lag.
projects.solutions: Utilized hardware-accelerated CSS translate3d variables instead of JavaScript scroll triggers.

projects.title: JamCafe Menu Hub
projects.description: An interactive storefront template with custom menus, coffee configurators, and logs.
projects.longDescription: An immersive sensory landing page for coffee shops, implementing coffee configuration dials, interactive recipes, and elegant typography.
projects.challenges: Simulating rich fluid states for customizable coffee options.
projects.solutions: Crafted procedural pure CSS keyframe fluid waves.

projects.title: Personal AI Portfolio
projects.description: A world-class technical showcase featuring 3D visual interaction and a dynamic AI assistant.
projects.longDescription: An ultra-premium developer website built with responsive layout systems, real-time THREE.js model components, and an integrated generative chat assistant to summarize qualifications.
projects.challenges: Rendering WebGL scenes in nested iframes without dragging browser frame rates.
projects.solutions: Initialized low-polygon model meshes and established rendering throttling based on viewport visibility.
futureImprovements: Integrate fully custom virtual environment shaders

awards.title: Champion (1st Place)
awards.description: Gained Champion title for demonstrating exceptional analytical thinking, innovation, and technical excellence during the MIS Datazone 2024 Competition, held on 28 July 2024 by the MIS Department.

awards.title: AI Innovation Excellence Badge
awards.description: Awarded for the development of Phnom Clean Up Crew civic tech tool, utilizing generative AI workflows and low-code rapid prototypes.

hackathons.category: AI Prompt Engineering • Generative AI • No-Code Development
hackathons.description: Participated in the First's Wave AI Prompting Hackathon, collaborating to build AI-powered applications using modern generative AI platforms. Gained intensive hands-on experience under tight constraints, demonstrating rapid prototyping workflows.
highlights: Designed AI-powered user interfaces with modern UX aesthetics.
Built functional web applications with AI-assisted development tools.
Used prompt engineering to improve AI-generated code and design quality.
Collaborated with teammates under hackathon time constraints.
Explored modern no-code and low-code AI development workflows.
achievements: Successfully participated in the First's Wave AI Prompting Hackathon 2026.
Gained hands-on experience with leading AI development platforms.
Expanded practical skills in AI-assisted software engineering.
Strengthened collaboration and rapid development capabilities.
